title: Steel
description: This mod adds steel to Minecraft. It adds armour, tools, weapons and one more thing but figure that out yourself
body:
## OVERVIEW
If you've ever wanted an alloy in minecraft this mod has got you covered.
This mod adds a new resource to minecraft called steel.
Its crafted by combining coal and iron to make blooms then blasting the bloom.

## ADDED CONTENT
### **ITEMS**
- SWORD
- KNIFE
- SHOVEL
- PICKAXE
- AXE
- HOE
### **ARMOR**
- HELMET
- CHESTPLATE
- LEGGINGS
- BOOTS
### **EXTRAS**
- CUSTOM WEAPON WITH A SPECIAL ABILITY(kind of broken)
## INSTALLATION
Drop the jar file into your mods folder and run minecraft with fabric installed

You can do whatever you want with this mod but I request you credit me
This was originally supposed to be titanium but I changed it to steel so the mod id is titanium
I have no plans to continue to work on this mod
